text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Yasuda Kinen. While waiting
for the race to start, Matikanetannhauser opens a
milk pudding she brought with her.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Who's a delicious-looking little pudding?
You are! Yes, you are!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, by the way, I heard Ikuno's running today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to race against her. Maybe I'll go to
her waiting room later and say hi.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Tannhauser. I came to tell you I'm looking
forward to running with you today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno! We were just talking about you. I'm
looking forward to running with you too!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Let's have a safe and good race.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Is that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Is that pudding from the dorm fridge?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Good eye! I brought it as my snack today!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Don't eat that! If I remember correctly, I believe
it's five days past its expiration date!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What?! No way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hurriedly checks the expiration date to find...
it expired five days ago!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That was a close one! Thanks, Ikuno!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You're very welcome. I'm glad I came over to say
hello.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It would be a shame if a rival as important as you
fell ill before the race.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes. Why don't I check the condition of your
cleats as well? Just to be safe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Y-you're too kind, Ikuno!
